comments.body: Sorry for the late response - I'm still getting the same exact error :(
I had the same problem. Re-installing Android Studio with SDK helped solve it.
I just tried that - it didn't work - I even used stackoverflow.com/questions/17625622/… to delete everything

answers.body:
Execute this in terminal window and see,

          gradlew clean build --refresh-dependencies

I had the error when installing new packages on my RN app. I fixed the error by running 

cd android/ && ./gradlew clean build --refresh-dependencies`

then 

cd ../

again 

react-native run-android

title: Execution failed for task 'app:mergeDebugResource'
body:
I'm getting this "Execution failed for task 'app:mergeDebugResource'" error every time I try to build or clean my project. I have reinstalled Gradle, Java, Android Studio, and all of the SDKs several times, so it's not that. And none of the answers on StackOverflow seem to be helpful. I'm trying to learn Android development but can't because of this error. Please help!

Here are the results of Gradle build --stacktrace:
